per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA sets a 90-day response period, while the REG permits an extension of the regulatory period by two further months where necessary; the texts are related temporally but do not clearly express the same constraint in directly conflicting terms without additional context.

evidence_rea: within a standard period of 90 days
evidence_reg: without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA allows response within 90 days, while the REG requires action information within one month of receipt, so the REA sets a later timeframe.

REG-050 applies specifically when the controller does not take action and requires informing the data subject of reasons and remedies; the REA does not address that conditional no-action scenario, so omission alone is not a deviation.
